market_context: Tech-heavy indices show strong 5-day momentum (QQQ +6.8%, SPY +5.3%) with low volatility (VIX 18.24, down 13.3%). Apple trades near analyst consensus targets ($288-299 range), supported by bullish analyst sentiment and 'Buy' ratings across 26+ covering analysts.

predictions.reasoning: QQQ has gained 6.8% over 5 days with sustained momentum. Low VIX (18.24) and positive tech sentiment support continued strength. Modest intraday gain of 0.6% aligns with consolidation after strong rally.

Analyst consensus averages $296-299 (15-16% upside), with 26 analysts maintaining 'Buy' ratings[4]. Current price $258.83 sits below all major price targets[1][2][4][7]. Wedbush's $350 target and BofA's $325 target provide bullish anchors.
SPY +5.3% over 5 days reflects broad market strength. VIX compression (down 13.3%) indicates low fear and risk-on positioning. Intraday continuation of modest gains likely as momentum persists.

NVDA benefits from QQQ momentum and tech sector strength. Current price near recent support; analyst sentiment remains constructive on AI/semiconductor demand. Modest 1.1% gain reflects participation in broader tech rally.
